title: Audius - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies governance contracts and immediately transfers tokens from the treasury.

red_flags: Setting governance addresses to custom deployments
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that modifies governance contracts and immediately transfers tokens from the treasury.
summary: The attacker exploited a storage collision vulnerability in AudiusAdminUpgradabilityProxy to reinitialize governance contracts and bypass safeguards. They then passed a malicious proposal to transfer 18M AUDIO tokens from the treasury, which could have been detected if a guard monitored for such transactions.
